description: Quality-adjusted value per euro across AI inference providers. Q is computed from 7 empirical dimensions (senate_telemetry + pr_outcomes). ϶ = Q / cost_factor.

panels.title: ϶ Overview
panels.description: The Encefalos (϶) system measures AI model value-for-money across 7 quality dimensions, normalized by provider cost factor.

options.content:
### Encefalos (϶) — Quality-Adjusted AI Value Score

The ϶ score measures **value-for-money** of AI models used in the QUASI senate pipeline. Each model is scored across 7 empirical dimensions, combined into a weighted composite **Q**, then divided by a provider cost factor.

#### Formula

```
϶ = Q / cost_factor

Q = 0.35·q₁ + 0.20·q₂ + 0.10·q₃ + 0.10·q₄ + 0.10·q₅ + 0.10·q₆ + 0.05·q₇
```

| Dimension | Weight | What it measures | Source column |
|---|---|---|---|
| **q₁** Correctness | 35% | Downstream approval rate | `downstream_verdict` |
| **q₂** Compliance | 20% | Valid JSON + HTTP 200 | `json_parse_ok`, `http_status` |
| **q₃** Latency | 10% | Speed vs slowest model (1 = fastest) | `latency_ms` (P50) |
| **q₄** Fidelity | 10% | Served model = requested model | `model_verified` |
| **q₅** Reliability | 10% | First-attempt success (no retries) | `retries`, `pipeline_attempt` |
| **q₆** Reasoning | 10% | Quality of verdict explanations | `verdict_reasoning` |
| **q₇** Traceability | 5% | Links to GitHub issues | `issue_number` |

#### Cost Factors

Cost factors normalize for provider pricing tiers. A model on a cheap provider gets a ϶ boost; expensive providers must deliver proportionally higher quality.

| Provider | Factor | | Provider | Factor |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| HuggingFace | 0.6 | | Together | 0.9 |
| Cerebras | 0.7 | | Fireworks | 0.9 |
| Sarvam | 0.7 | | OpenRouter | 1.0 |
| SwissAI | 0.7 | | Mistral | 1.1 |
| Groq | 0.8 | | DeepInfra | 1.0 |

#### Senate Roles

Models are evaluated in 5 pipeline roles, grouped into **Coding** and **Reasoning**:

| Role | Group | Function |
|---|---|---|
| **A1_council** | Reasoning | Strategic priority-setting |
| **A2_drafter** | Reasoning | GitHub issue creation |
| **A3_gate** | Reasoning | Proposal approval/rejection |
| **B1_solver** | Coding | Code implementation |
| **B2_reviewer** | Coding | Pull request review |

#### Data Source

All metrics come from the `senate_telemetry` table on the QUASI PostgreSQL database. Each row represents one model invocation in the senate pipeline. The dashboard respects the time range picker — adjust it to compare different periods.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, base_model || ' (' || provider || ')' AS metric, enc_score AS value
FROM (WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model, provider, COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY base_model, provider HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1 AS q1, d.q2 AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0)) AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5) AS q4,
    d.q5 AS q5, COALESCE(d.q6_raw, 0.5) AS q6, d.q7 AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cerebras' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'fireworks' THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'together' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'sarvam' THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'swissai' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'mistral' THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)::numeric,3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)/cost_f)::numeric,3) AS enc_score
FROM scored) enc
ORDER BY enc_score DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 🏆 Best ϶ Model
panels.description:
The model with the highest ϶ score across ALL senate roles (coding + reasoning) in the selected time range.

**϶ = Q / cost_factor**

Q is a weighted composite of 7 dimensions. Models need ≥3 calls to qualify.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, base_model || ' (' || provider || ')' AS metric, enc_score AS value
FROM (WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model, provider, COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY base_model, provider HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1 AS q1, d.q2 AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0)) AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5) AS q4,
    d.q5 AS q5, COALESCE(d.q6_raw, 0.5) AS q6, d.q7 AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cerebras' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'fireworks' THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'together' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'sarvam' THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'swissai' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'mistral' THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)::numeric,3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)/cost_f)::numeric,3) AS enc_score
FROM scored) enc
ORDER BY enc_score DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Best ϶/€ Score
panels.description:
The numeric ϶ score of the best overall model.

**Scale:** >0.7 = good (green), 0.4–0.7 = moderate (yellow), <0.4 = poor (red).

Scores >1.0 are possible when low-cost providers deliver high quality.

targets.rawSql:
WITH q_vals AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) / NULLIF(MAX(latency_ms), 0)) AS q3,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN role IN ('A3_gate','B2_reviewer') AND verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ROUND((0.35*q1 + 0.20*q2 + 0.10*COALESCE(q3,0.5) + 0.10*COALESCE(q4_raw,0.5) + 0.10*q5 + 0.10*COALESCE(q6_raw,q1) + 0.05*q7)::numeric, 3) AS value
FROM q_vals

panels.title: Avg Q Composite
panels.description:
Unweighted average Q composite across all qualifying models.

**Q = 0.35·q₁ + 0.20·q₂ + 0.10·q₃ + 0.10·q₄ + 0.10·q₅ + 0.10·q₆ + 0.05·q₇**

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND model_verified IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Provider Fidelity q₄
panels.description:
Average provider fidelity (q₄) — how often the model actually served matches the model requested.

**Source:** `model_verified` column in `senate_telemetry`. Some providers silently substitute cheaper models.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false

panels.title: First-Attempt Success q₅
panels.description:
Average first-attempt success rate (q₅) — calls that succeeded with zero retries and on the first pipeline attempt.

**Source:** `retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1`

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(
  output_tokens_approx::float / NULLIF(latency_ms::float / 1000.0, 0)
)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND output_tokens_approx > 0 AND latency_ms > 0

panels.title: Avg Throughput
panels.description:
Average output throughput in tokens/second across all models.

**Formula:** `output_tokens_approx * 1000 / latency_ms`

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, base_model || ' (' || provider || ')' AS metric, enc_score AS value
FROM (WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model, provider, COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
    AND role IN ('B1_solver','B2_reviewer')
  GROUP BY base_model, provider HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1 AS q1, d.q2 AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0)) AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5) AS q4,
    d.q5 AS q5, COALESCE(d.q6_raw, 0.5) AS q6, d.q7 AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cerebras' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'fireworks' THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'together' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'sarvam' THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'swissai' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'mistral' THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)::numeric,3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)/cost_f)::numeric,3) AS enc_score
FROM scored) enc
ORDER BY enc_score DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 💻 Best Coder
panels.description:
Best model for **coding tasks** (roles: B1_solver, B2_reviewer).

B1_solver writes code to solve GitHub issues. B2_reviewer reviews pull requests for correctness.

Uses same ϶ formula but filtered to coding roles only. Minimum 2 calls to qualify.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, base_model || ' (' || provider || ')' AS metric, enc_score AS value
FROM (WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model, provider, COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
    AND role IN ('B1_solver','B2_reviewer')
  GROUP BY base_model, provider HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1 AS q1, d.q2 AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0)) AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5) AS q4,
    d.q5 AS q5, COALESCE(d.q6_raw, 0.5) AS q6, d.q7 AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cerebras' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'fireworks' THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'together' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'sarvam' THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'swissai' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'mistral' THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)::numeric,3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)/cost_f)::numeric,3) AS enc_score
FROM scored) enc
ORDER BY enc_score DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Coder ϶ Score
panels.description:
The ϶ score of the best coding model.

Coding-specific scoring still uses all 7 Q dimensions but only counts calls where `role IN ('B1_solver', 'B2_reviewer')`.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, base_model || ' (' || provider || ')' AS metric, enc_score AS value
FROM (WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model, provider, COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
    AND role IN ('A1_council','A2_drafter','A3_gate')
  GROUP BY base_model, provider HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1 AS q1, d.q2 AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0)) AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5) AS q4,
    d.q5 AS q5, COALESCE(d.q6_raw, 0.5) AS q6, d.q7 AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cerebras' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'fireworks' THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'together' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'sarvam' THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'swissai' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'mistral' THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)::numeric,3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)/cost_f)::numeric,3) AS enc_score
FROM scored) enc
ORDER BY enc_score DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 🧠 Best Reasoner
panels.description:
Best model for **reasoning tasks** (roles: A1_council, A2_drafter, A3_gate).

A1_council sets strategic priorities. A2_drafter creates GitHub issues. A3_gate approves/rejects proposals.

Uses same ϶ formula but filtered to reasoning roles only. Minimum 2 calls to qualify.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, base_model || ' (' || provider || ')' AS metric, enc_score AS value
FROM (WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model, provider, COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
    AND role IN ('A1_council','A2_drafter','A3_gate')
  GROUP BY base_model, provider HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1 AS q1, d.q2 AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0)) AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5) AS q4,
    d.q5 AS q5, COALESCE(d.q6_raw, 0.5) AS q6, d.q7 AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'cerebras' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'fireworks' THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface' THEN 0.6 WHEN 'together' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'sarvam' THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'swissai' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'mistral' THEN 1.1 ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)::numeric,3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1+0.20*q2+0.10*q3+0.10*q4+0.10*q5+0.10*q6+0.05*q7)/cost_f)::numeric,3) AS enc_score
FROM scored) enc
ORDER BY enc_score DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Reasoner ϶ Score
panels.description:
The ϶ score of the best reasoning model.

Reasoning-specific scoring uses all 7 Q dimensions but only counts calls where `role IN ('A1_council', 'A2_drafter', 'A3_gate')`.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
dims AS (
  SELECT
    base_model,
    provider,
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1,
    AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
    AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q4_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5,
    AVG(CASE WHEN role IN ('A3_gate','B2_reviewer') AND verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN
          CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END
        ELSE NULL END) AS q6_raw,
    AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
    AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY base_model, provider
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
),
lat_max AS (SELECT MAX(p50_ms) AS mx FROM dims),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    d.base_model, d.provider, d.n,
    d.q1                                                        AS q1,
    d.q2                                                        AS q2,
    GREATEST(0, 1.0 - d.p50_ms / NULLIF(lm.mx, 0))            AS q3,
    COALESCE(d.q4_raw, 0.5)                                     AS q4,
    d.q5                                                        AS q5,
    COALESCE(d.q6_raw, d.q1)                                    AS q6,
    d.q7                                                        AS q7,
    CASE d.provider
      WHEN 'groq'         THEN 0.8
      WHEN 'cerebras'     THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'fireworks'    THEN 0.9
      WHEN 'huggingface'  THEN 0.6
      WHEN 'hf'           THEN 0.6
      WHEN 'swissai'      THEN 0.7
      WHEN 'mistral'      THEN 1.1
      WHEN 'native'       THEN 1.2
      ELSE 1.0
    END AS cost_f
  FROM dims d CROSS JOIN lat_max lm
)
SELECT
  base_model, provider, n,
  ROUND(q1::numeric, 3)  AS q1_correctness,
  ROUND(q2::numeric, 3)  AS q2_compliance,
  ROUND(q3::numeric, 3)  AS q3_latency,
  ROUND(q4::numeric, 3)  AS q4_fidelity,
  ROUND(q5::numeric, 3)  AS q5_reliability,
  ROUND(q6::numeric, 3)  AS q6_reasoning,
  ROUND(q7::numeric, 3)  AS q7_traceability,
  ROUND((0.35*q1 + 0.20*q2 + 0.10*q3 +
         0.10*q4 + 0.10*q5 + 0.10*q6 + 0.05*q7)::numeric, 3) AS Q_composite,
  ROUND(((0.35*q1 + 0.20*q2 + 0.10*q3 +
          0.10*q4 + 0.10*q5 + 0.10*q6 + 0.05*q7) / cost_f)::numeric, 3) AS enc_score
FROM scored
ORDER BY enc_score DESC

panels.title: Encefalos Score — Full Ranking (code-gen weights: q₁×0.35, q₂×0.20, q₃–q₆×0.10, q₇×0.05)
panels.description:
Full ranking table showing all qualifying models with their 7 individual dimension scores, the weighted Q composite, and the final ϶ score (Q/cost_factor).

**Weights:** q₁ correctness ×0.35, q₂ compliance ×0.20, q₃ latency ×0.10, q₄ fidelity ×0.10, q₅ reliability ×0.10, q₆ reasoning ×0.10, q₇ traceability ×0.05.

**Cost factors** normalize for provider pricing: Cerebras=0.7, HuggingFace=0.6, Groq=0.8, Together/Fireworks=0.9, Mistral=1.1, others=1.0. Lower cost → higher ϶ for same quality.

panels.title: q₁ Correctness · q₂ Compliance · q₃ Latency

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY q1 DESC

panels.title: q₁ Correctness by Model (approval rate)
panels.description:
**q₁ Correctness** — approval rate by downstream validators.

**Formula:** `AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)`

**Weight in Q:** 35% (highest — correctness is the primary goal)

**Source:** `downstream_verdict` column. Set by A3_gate (for reasoning) or B2_reviewer + CI (for coding).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q2
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY q2 DESC

panels.title: q₂ Compliance by Model (json_ok + http 200)
panels.description:
**q₂ Compliance** — structured output reliability.

**Formula:** `AVG(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true AND http_status = 200 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)`

**Weight in Q:** 20%

Measures whether the model returns valid JSON and a successful HTTP response. Critical because the senate pipeline requires parseable structured output.

targets.rawSql:
WITH lats AS (
  SELECT base_model,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50
  FROM senate_telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT base_model,
  GREATEST(0, 1.0 - p50 / NULLIF(MAX(p50) OVER(), 0)) AS q3
FROM lats
ORDER BY q3 DESC

panels.title: q₃ Latency Score by Model (1 − P50/max, higher=faster)
panels.description:
**q₃ Latency** — speed score normalized to the slowest model.

**Formula:** `1.0 - (P50_latency_ms / max_P50_across_all_models)`

A score of 1.0 = fastest, 0.0 = slowest in the cohort. Uses median (P50) to be robust against outliers.

**Weight in Q:** 10%

panels.title: q₄ Provider Fidelity · q₅ Reliability · Throughput

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q4
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND model_verified IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY q4 DESC

panels.title: q₄ Provider Fidelity (model_verified rate)
panels.description:
**q₄ Provider Fidelity** — model substitution detection.

**Formula:** `AVG(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)` (NULL = unknown, counted as 0.5)

**Weight in Q:** 10%

Some providers (especially OpenRouter) may silently swap the requested model for a cheaper one. The senate verifies served model identity via response headers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY q5 DESC

panels.title: q₅ Reliability (retries=0 AND attempt=1)
panels.description:
**q₅ Reliability** — first-attempt success rate.

**Formula:** `AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)`

**Weight in Q:** 10%

Measures operational reliability: did the call succeed without needing retries or pipeline re-attempts? Penalizes flaky APIs and rate-limited providers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  ROUND(AVG(output_tokens_approx::float / NULLIF(latency_ms::float / 1000.0, 0))::numeric, 1) AS tok_per_sec
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND output_tokens_approx > 0 AND latency_ms > 0
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY tok_per_sec DESC

panels.title: Throughput by Model (output tokens/s)
panels.description:
Output throughput in tokens per second.

**Formula:** `output_tokens_approx * 1000 / latency_ms`

Not a Q dimension — shown for reference. Higher throughput = faster generation. Varies by model size, provider hardware, and load.

panels.title: q₆ Domain Reasoning · q₇ Traceability · Model Substitution

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q6_coverage
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND role IN ('A3_gate','B2_reviewer')
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY q6_coverage DESC

panels.title: q₆ Domain Reasoning — Reasoning Coverage by Model
panels.description:
**q₆ Domain Reasoning** — quality of explanations in review/gate roles.

**Formula:** For A3_gate and B2_reviewer calls that include `verdict_reasoning`: approved verdicts score 1.0, others score 0.5. NULL reasoning = excluded.

**Weight in Q:** 10%

Measures whether models provide sound reasoning when making approval/rejection decisions, not just correct verdicts.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END) AS q7
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
GROUP BY base_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY q7 DESC

panels.title: q₇ Traceability — Issue+Cycle Link Rate
panels.description:
**q₇ Traceability** — link rate to GitHub issues.

**Formula:** `AVG(CASE WHEN issue_number IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END)`

**Weight in Q:** 5% (lowest — supplementary signal)

Measures whether model outputs create traceable artifacts (GitHub issues, PRs). Models that produce work linked to the issue tracker score higher.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, provider, model_id, served_model,
  CASE WHEN model_verified = false THEN '❌ substituted' ELSE '✅ verified' END AS status
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND model_verified IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 40

panels.title: Model Substitution Events (q₄ violations)
panels.description:
Log of model substitution events — cases where the provider served a different model than requested.

**Detection:** `model_verified = false` OR `served_model != model_string`

These events directly impact q₄ (Provider Fidelity) scores.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp,$__interval),
  base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q1
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: q₁ Correctness Trend by Model (4-hour bins)
panels.description:
Correctness (q₁) trend over time, bucketed in 4-hour intervals per model.

Shows whether model performance is improving, degrading, or stable. Useful for detecting provider-side model updates or degradation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(timestamp,$__interval),
  base_model,
  AVG(CASE WHEN retries = 0 AND pipeline_attempt = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS q5
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: q₅ Reliability Trend — First-Attempt Success (4-hour bins)
panels.description:
First-attempt success (q₅) trend over time, bucketed in 4-hour intervals.

Spikes in failure often correlate with provider outages or rate limiting changes.

panels.title: PR Outcomes — CI Signal into q₁

targets.rawSql:
SELECT b1_solver_model AS base_model,
  ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN ci_status = 'passing' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS ci_pass_pct
FROM pr_outcomes
WHERE ci_status != 'pending'
GROUP BY b1_solver_model
ORDER BY ci_pass_pct DESC

panels.title: CI Pass Rate by Solver Model
panels.description:
CI pass rate by solver model — percentage of PRs where CI (GitHub Actions) passes.

**Source:** `pr_outcomes` table joined to `senate_telemetry`.

This feeds back into q₁: a PR that passes CI is more likely to be approved.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT b1_solver_model AS base_model,
  ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN merged = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END)::numeric, 1) AS merge_pct
FROM pr_outcomes
WHERE merged IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY b1_solver_model
ORDER BY merge_pct DESC

panels.title: Merge Rate by Solver Model
panels.description:
Merge rate by solver model — percentage of PRs that get merged to main.

**Source:** `pr_outcomes` table.

The ultimate measure of code quality: did the human maintainer accept the model's work?

targets.rawSql:
SELECT created_at, pr_number, issue_number, b1_solver_model,
  ci_status, merged, merged_at, pr_url
FROM pr_outcomes
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Senate PR Log — CI + Merge Status
panels.description:
Full log of senate-generated PRs with their CI status and merge outcome.

Columns: PR number, solver model, CI result (pass/fail), merge status, timestamps.

title: QUASI Encefalos — AI Compute Value (϶/€)
